entities.name: GENOMICS-BASED BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding approach using genomic information to improve crop traits

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: Ensuring that all people have access to enough nutritious food to lead a healthy life

entities.name: FOOD SAFETY
entities.description: The scientific discipline describing handling, preparation, and storage of food in ways that prevent foodborne illness

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Plants grown for food, typically on a large scale

entities.name: HUNGER
entities.description: A feeling of discomfort or weakness caused by lack of food

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: Lack of proper nutrition, caused by not having enough to eat or not eating enough of the right things

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: FOOD QUALITY
entities.description: The characteristics of food that are acceptable to consumers, including nutritional value

entities.name: HIDDEN HUNGER
entities.description: A form of malnutrition where the body lacks essential vitamins and minerals

entities.name: MICRO-NUTRIENT DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A condition resulting from an inadequate intake of essential vitamins and minerals

entities.name: SEED ZN
entities.description: The concentration of zinc in the seeds of a crop

entities.name: SEED FE
entities.description: The concentration of iron in the seeds of a crop

entities.name: SEED PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of protein present in the seeds of a crop
